info.name: AutoCreat API - Full Test Suite
info.description: Complete API test suite for the AutoCreat Go server. Tests all endpoints in dependency order: Auth → Companies → Roles → Users → Forms → Models → Flows → Instances → Letters → Tickets → Stats

body.raw:
{
  "name": "API Test Role",
  "description": "Created by API test",
  "level": "member",
  "companyId": "{{companyId}}",
  "permissions": [
    {
      "resource": "tickets",
      "canCreate": true,
      "canRead": true,
      "canUpdate": false,
      "canDelete": false,
      "customActions": []
    }
  ],
  "isActive": true
}

{
  "name": "API Test Letter",
  "description": "Created by API test",
  "companyId": "{{companyId}}",
  "content": "Dear {{name}},\n\nThis is a test letter.\n\nRegards,\nTest",
  "variables": ["name"],
  "status": "active",
  "category": "test"
}

{
  "title": "API Test Ticket",
  "description": "This ticket was created by the API test suite",
  "companyId": "{{companyId}}",
  "priority": "medium",
  "tags": ["api-test", "automated"]
}
